violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed uncovered food in upright freezer in food prep area.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Store food items away from unprotected drain line at 3 tub sink cabinet/counter in kitchen area.

Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. Soda gun holster drain line placed in ice bin with drink ice. Drain line should be outside of ice bin.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Cabinets/counters/drawers showing wear & disrepair.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Rest room doors not fitted with self closing door devices.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under equipment.
